allowedTypes.description: List of allowed link types. If empty, all types are allowed.

allowLanguageSynchronization.description: Allows to select if localization uses custom or default language value

allowedOptions.description: Display certain options in the link browser. To allow all options, skip this configuration. To deny all options, set this configuration to [] (empty array).

allowedFileExtensions.description: List of allowed file extensions. If empty, all extensions are allowed.

browserTitle.description: Allows to set a different title attribute for the Link Browser icon, defaults to Link.

enableBrowser.description: To disable the Link Browser, set this option to false.

default.description: Default value set if a new record is created.

mode.description: This property is related to the placeholder property. When defined, a checkbox will appear above the field.

nullable.description: Allows database null values for the field

readOnly.description: Renders the field in a way that the user can see the value but cannot edit it.

required.description: If set, the field becomes mandatory.

searchable.description: Enables search functionality for the field

size.description: Abstract value for the width of the field
